zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Sapcote於1430年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾埃爾頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton21歲，母親Lady Alice de Vaux21歲。他於大約1456年與Anne Semark在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1485年8月22日在英國亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Sapcote于1430年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾埃爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton21岁，母亲Lady Alice de Vaux21岁。他于大约1456年与Anne Semark在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1485年8月22日在英国亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Sapcote was born in 1430, in Elton, Huntingdonshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton, was 21 and his mother, Lady Alice de Vaux, was 21. He married Anne Semark about 1456, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 22 August 1485, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Sapcote est né en 1430, à Elton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Vaux, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Anne Semark environ 1456, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 22 août 1485, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Sapcote 1430 in Elton, Huntingdonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton 21 und seine Mutter Lady Alice de Vaux 21. Er hat um 1456 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Anne Semark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 22. August 1485 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Sapcote è nato il nel 1430 nel Elton, Huntingdonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice de Vaux, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Anne Semark circa 1456, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 22 agosto 1485, nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Sapcoteが1430年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアエルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Sapcote of Eltonは21歳，母Lady Alice de Vauxは21歳であった。約1456年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでAnne Semarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1485年8月22日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Sapcote(이)가 1430년 영국 헌틴그도실르 엘턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Vaux(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Anne Semark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1485년 8월 22일 영국 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Sapcote nasceu em 1430, em Elton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Vaux, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Semark aproximadamente 1456, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1485, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Sapcote родился в 1430 г. в местности элтон, хантингдоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Vaux, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Semark около 1456 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 22 августа 1485 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Sapcote nació en 1430, en Elton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Alice de Vaux, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Anne Semark aproximadamente 1456, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1485, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
